tasks.label: Build for Archer C6
tasks.command: cd site_blocker/ ; CARGO_TARGET_MIPSEL_UNKNOWN_LINUX_MUSL_LINKER=/home/fbiedi/Documents/openwrt/openwrt-sdk-24.10.5-ramips-mt7621_gcc-13.3.0_musl.Linux-x86_64/staging_dir/toolchain-mipsel_24kc_gcc-13.3.0_musl/bin/mipsel-openwrt-linux-musl-gcc cargo +nightly build -Z build-std=core,panic_abort --target mipsel-unknown-linux-musl --release
